<!--
Title format: [type] [TR.0X] Your paper title
e.g. [Full paper] [TR.02] Algorithmic management in last-mile delivery

If this PR is NOT a submission (it's a bug fix, doc tweak, etc.), feel free to delete this template body and just describe the change.
-->

## Submission

- **File:** `submissions/<your-handle>.md`
- **Type:** [Full paper | Note | Panel | Poster | Practitioner report]
- **Track:** TR.0X — [name]

## One-sentence contribution

What's new about this work, in one sentence.

## Conflicts of interest

List any COIs with the program committee or likely reviewers. Write "none" if there are none.

## Checklist

- [ ] My abstract is in `submissions/<my-handle>.md`
- [ ] Word count is between 300 and 500 (body of abstract only)
- [ ] I've picked exactly one track
- [ ] I've picked exactly one submission type
- [ ] I've read and agree to the [open-review policy](../README.md#review-policy) — this PR and its reviews will be public
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Additional context

Anything else reviewers should know. (Working title, in-flight revisions, scope of remaining work for a full paper, etc.)

## Attachments

If submitting a full paper, attach the PDF here. (Drag the file into the comment box; GitHub will upload.)
